'''AX-2''' was the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[AX system]]. It was [[Moon/Legends|moonless]] and barren.<ref name="Tale" /> It orbited the [[AX system's dwarf star|system's dwarf star]].

{{Planet-stub}}
